reviews.negatives: I did not realise that most of the hotels in Da Lat did not have air conditioning.  Although the weather was cool, the fan was quite noisy so it did disturb my sleep.  There were no good cafe/restaurants within walking distance.

reviews.title: The smell and the noise
reviews.text: First look, the room is ok. Seemed clean, modern equipment, shower worked well and so on. Downsides are: walls are paper thin - you can literally hear anything and everything, from footsteps in a hallway, ongoing construction next to the hotel (which started from 6am). Worst of all - the room started to smell. It smelled so bad it made me sick. When I complained, the staff did not understand my English and when they finally did I was told it’s because of “rain”. I’m not staying here anymore and will not recommend to anyone.

reviews.title: Sterile, Far From Centre
reviews.text:
This hotel lacks soul. It's a cheap looking industrial design with lots of gray surfaces. There was no water bung in the toilets, so you'll have to make do with paper.
The view wasn't so special -plenty of corrugated iron and the neighbour's laundry from my window. 
It's about five kilometres out of town, and I was glad I'd only booked one night and could change hotels the next day. 
The breakfast is abysmal. I had noodles and a boiled egg. Better to eat breakfast outside... except there isn't much close by.

reviews.title: Nice room but staff is not nice
reviews.text:
The room is nice but It was full of javel water smell when I checked in. I was almost vomiting at that time.
Staff is not friendly. No one smiled during my stay. All of them only shown a cold face. Breakfast closed at 9:30 but I came at 9am and most of the dishes were empty. There was no refilled but 9:30 am staff just came & said “ Please get your food before clearing “ The breakfast should not be included. We can go out for a better choice

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Vị trí
reviews.negatives: Dịch vụ. Sơ hở gì cũng tính thêm tiền, mà dịch vụ ko ok. Trước chuyến đi Đà Lạt gđ bị lừa đảo tiền trên mạng trên mạng bởi 1 page mang tên ks đã thấy hơi xu, vẫn cố chấp vào booking.com book 1 căn hộ tại ks này. Gđ mình đến trc 2h chiều khoảng 15ph để nhận phòng thì lễ tân báo nhà mình ngồi chờ vì khách mới trả phòng giờ mới bắt đầu dọn dẹp, đáng lẽ khi biết có khách book sau thì ks nên báo trc cho nhóm khách cũ trả phòng đúng giờ, thấy mình khó chịu lễ tân có nó có gì để e giảm giá lại bù. Chờ hơn 30ph lên nhận thì phòng ẩm ướt, toilet còn dính bọt kem đánh răng của khách cũ, ghế sofa cũ da nứt nẻ, cửa kính phòng, lan can bện dơ. Thật sự ai đi du lịch nhiều và sợ cái cảm giác phòng ốc mới đc vệ sinh xong còn ẩm ướt mình vô liền thì sẽ hiểu nớ ớn ớn như thế nào.  Trả 6tr9 tiền căn hộ, thêm 1tr6 tiền extra cho tài xế và người nhà đến sau, hơn 8tr bạc cho 3 ngày thì mình thấY ĐL có nhiều chỗ lưu trú có dv tốt hơn. Mà sau đó check out trả phòng cũng ko thấy nhắc refund lại tiền như đã nói 😂 … Thôi trải nghiệm cho biết chứ bye đây luôn rồi

reviews.title: disappointing
reviews.text: They said that it's a new hotel but when we  get our rooms, the wall has water stain on it and the floor underneath the table has water. Staffs in the hotel can hardly speaks english. Only a lady at the reception with long hair (forgot her name) could speaks english and is really helpful but other than that, it's terrible. They took and kept our passports when we check-in and for the 1st night when we return the rented bikes, the staff asked us which room no. and once we provided, to our surprise, he handed us a passport which does not belongs to us. This is extremely disappointing coz our passport is not being kept safe. the hotel has no electricity twice in half a day and we we requested to check-out half an hour late coz we need to pack since your hotel has no electricity for quite some time but we were being told "NO".

We were apologetic that you had bad experience at the hotel. The day you came to our hotel and check-in , according to the hotel's regulations, the check-in time would be after 2:00 p.m., but at 12:00 p.m, you arrived and asked to check in early. That is the time that our old guest check-out (12:00 p.m) , and hotel didn't have a room available to assist you and you really wanted to cancel that room. Apologetic about that. During my stay at the hotel, our receptionists helped you the best as they could. And you forgot something in the lobby, we are already found it and kept it for you. 
So I do not know why you are dissatisfied?
 We’re looking forward to seeing you at the hotel in the near future.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text:
It’s a newer hotel in Dalat. 5-6 minutes away from the center. We stayed for 8 days and 8
7 nights. They were kind to let us check into our hotel room early. The hotel breakfast did not have a large section of western food, mainly Vietnamese courses. The receptionist were nice, however they had no clue what was going on. Youll need to rent a motorcycle from the receptionist to get to most areas around da lat. the only downfall is the rooms did not have air conditioner. With one window it did get hot and humid at night. There was no breeze coming into the room. During the day temps can get up to high 80s so the room would be really hot. It definitely needs AC because with the temperature changes and the fan blow it’s easy to get sick like we did. All in all it was an okay stay.

reviews.title: Clean the room carelessly.
reviews.text: In 2023, my husband and I found the hotel quite decent, the room cleaning was pretty good, so this year we booked 3 rooms. However, this experience was quite poor; the hotel had bad soundproofing, so my room and my sister's room were close to the road and we could hear the noise of cars passing by very loudly. A notable downside is that the room cleaning was very careless; in my room, there was a stain on the toilet with a sign indicating cleaning, but it was hardly scrubbed, they only refilled towels and soap. The refill soap was just thrown on the tray without being neatly arranged. Since I have a little baby, I asked for an extra blanket to put down so he wouldn't fall off the bed. In the morning before we left, I rolled the blanket up and placed it on the bed, but the cleaning staff hardly touched the bed, leaving it as it was without sweeping or rearranging the pillows and blankets. I told myself that spending nearly 1 million VND per night and having room service like this is really disappointing.
reviews.response:
Xin chào chị Trúc,

The Luxe Hotel Đà Lạt xin chân thành cảm ơn chị đã bớt chút thời gian để góp ý cho khách sạn ạ

Chúng tôi thành thật xin lỗi vì trải nghiệm của chị tại The Luxe Hotel không đạt kỳ vọng của chị và gia đình. Đây là điều chúng tôi thực sự lấy làm tiếc và nghiêm túc xem xét để khắc phục.

Một lần nữa The Luxe Hotel xin cảm ơn chị đã thẳng thắng góp ý kiến và hy vọng chúng tôi có cơ hội sửa chữa sai sót để được đón tiếp chị và gia đình trong tương lai gần.

Trân trọng

The Luxe Hotel  Đà Lạt Team

reviews.title: Bad odor in Bathroom because of the sewer
reviews.text: The place has a lovely location, I am not sure if I was not lucky to have a room with an awful smell from the sewer. And the smell was reduced after some effort from the staff but it did not disappear.  On top of it, the last night I stayed there, the alarm from the other room went off more than 3 times from 1 am - 3 am in the middle of the night. I did not know why the staff did not fix it right away (each time was about 30mins and woke me up when I was trying to fall asleep again) even though I have called them to fix it. This was the last straw when I tried to talk to the staff the next morning about this incident but what I received was a very dismissive answer which was "There might be someone who smoked in the room"

reviews.title: Loved the spaciousness of the 3 bedroom apartment, pity about the roaches
reviews.text: For a 3-star hotel, I got what I paid for 5 nights. Upon check-in, I called Reception to inform that one of the bedrooms had blown lights. Engineering never came to fix the lights. Which was fine because my daughter wasn't bothered by the lack of lights in her room. What I hated was the daily roaches we found when we came back from our daily outings. And baby lizards which seem to want to wander into my master bedroom bathroom every night! Last thing which took the cake was on the last night when the master bathroom flooded due to either bad drainage or blocked pipes and water flowed out to the bedroom.  Seems the floor was slanted if water could flow out along the sides of the wall from bathroom to bedroom. Reception called housekeeping to bring towels and rags to soak up the water but didn't come back to mop up the residual water. Nothing more to say...

reviews.response:
Xin chào bạn Hằng,

Cảm ơn bạn đã chia sẻ những trải nghiệm của mình tại khách sạn Đà Lạt. Chúng tôi rất tiếc khi biết rằng kỳ nghỉ của bạn không được trọn vẹn như mong đợi.

Chúng tôi ghi nhận những phản hồi của bạn về vấn đề dọn phòng chưa kỹ và việc phòng không có vòi xịt. Đây là những thông tin quý báu để chúng tôi xem xét và cải thiện chất lượng dịch vụ của mình. Chúng tôi sẽ rà soát lại quy trình dọn phòng và đảm bảo rằng nhân viên được đào tạo kỹ lưỡng hơn để đáp ứng các tiêu chuẩn vệ sinh cao nhất. Về vấn đề vòi xịt, chúng tôi sẽ xem xét khả năng trang bị vòi xịt cho các phòng trong thời gian tới, nhằm mang đến sự tiện nghi tốt nhất cho khách hàng.

Chúng tôi luôn nỗ lực để mang đến cho khách hàng những trải nghiệm tốt nhất và sự hài lòng tuyệt đối. Chúng tôi hy vọng rằng, trong tương lai, chúng tôi sẽ có cơ hội được đón tiếp bạn trở lại và mang đến cho bạn một kỳ nghỉ thật sự đáng nhớ.

Trân trọng,
The Luxe Hotel Đà Lạt

reviews.title: Toilet stinks!
reviews.text: I was there with my wife and son for 3 nights.  The hotel is new, room is big, the bed is comfy, location is not so bad (you won't find any restaurant nearby) and the breakfast is good with lot of choices. Unfortunately, the toilet was stinky. I guess it was from people throwing the toilet paper in the trash instead of flushing it down as a way to prevent it from getting clogged. In that case, the hotel manager should figure out a way to prevent that stink. Also, we found some long hair in the shower although all 3 of us have short hair :-(. In general, we have a okay stay at this hotel but it can be improved if the manager pays attention to the detail as mentioned above.

reviews.title: They didn't make up my room probably!
reviews.text: Stay there for 2 nights. The morning when we left our room to have breakfast at the hotel. Came back to the room after 15 minutes and realized that the housekeepers just made up our bed only and left the floor dirty, they didn't cleaned up the toilet either. They pretended like the room was make up already but all they did is just made up out bed in 15 minutes when we were out. Location is good but there is problem with the service and cleanliness.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: The location is good and not too far from downtown and there's parking.  The room was clean except for the ceiling fan that has collected lots of dust.  The staff seemed untrained except for the receptionists.  Most of them don't smile or greet you. Those standing at the door to the breakfast buffet lounge have no smiles on while asking which room you stay in :) The facility is good overall. The hallway of our floor smelled like heavy smokers had been around.  It would be a much better place if the management paid attention to training their staff to be more welcoming and to details. Overall, it's a decent, simple place to stay.

reviews.title: New built hotel, spacious room  variety breakfast
reviews.text: Housekeepers need to be more detail and improving theiir cleaning standard. They folded dirty bath towel and plced it together wih clean towel on my first chevk-in day. Room and lobby need more decoration. No complimentary tea nd coffee in the room. About 3km to the  core downtown of Da Lat. breakfast was adequately served.. I will be bck

The front desk staff were cold and flat but others were friendly. The hotel is new, clean  and room is spacious.. the buffet breakfast offers various choices of Vietnamese dishes. There are also bread, butter, james and eggs; fruits, juices, coffee and tea....

reviews.title: overall good value for money
reviews.text: new hotel,  modern interior design, smart tv with netflix and amazon, however not connected to internet(unsolvable issue as we were told), clean, spacey rooms. breakfast abundant, although it seems for most meals to be out by 8am after which they don't restock. 15 min on foot from the center, not really anything else around. taxi is 30-50K. hotel offers 140K per day bike rental service, you just return it to the hotel in the evening which is convenient.

reviews.title: Affordable
reviews.text:
This hotel building not very obvious , very easy to miss the building . We took Long time to find the location as the cab driver took us to a wrong place. 
Room is cosy , mattress is comfortable. Room only have one mirror although we booked family room, but if for 4 person, one mirror is really too little ! 
Breakfast can be better , this is what I really don’t like. No much choices , especially for foreign tourists who don’t like to eat local cuisine.

reviews.title: Spacious room, quieter area
reviews.text: We arrived at midnight, the bus dropped us off at the building in front of the hotel and we were looking for the entrance. Thankfully some hotel workers were working on lights along the lane to the hotel and showed us the way. Family room and bathroom are huge and very comfortable. Breakfast is average. Hotel is around 20 mins walk away from the busy city centre. It will take around 10 minutes walk to the  nearest lakes. There are no souvenier shops or convenience marts nearby.

reviews.title: sleepless night
reviews.text:
- The elevator makes this loud "ding dong" sound all night long throughout the whole building.
- Poorly isolated as we could hear the families coming back to the hotel until as late as 2am, being noisy in the hallways.

- Staff: there is only one female staff member wearing glasses, who is enthusiastic and supportive, while the male receptionist works poorly. Guests arrive and he is still lying down sleeping, unable to address the guests' issues.
- Amenities: the room does not match the pictures; the pictures show two large windows, but the room only has one small window. The room is spacious but feels empty because there are not many amenities. On the plus side, the room is clean. The hotel towels are old. 
- At this price, there are many better options in the center. Overall, it's just okay.

Location is close to the central lake (walking distance) but it is on the main road so the walk may not be as pleasant.

reviews.title: Looked nice but...
reviews.text:
I chose this hotel because it's relatively new and looks clean. Also I chose the deluxe room which is a little more expensive than the standard double hoping that I could be given a room on the higher floor.
Not so much difference btwn standard double and deluxe double in terms of the room condition. They are all located in B1 or B2 etc. 
Also I found hair not mine nor my sissy's on the bedsheet. Didnt bother to complain but it would have been better if the hotel could care much abt cleaning. 
As for the location, not sure abt using public buses but noticed grab taxis wouldnt come to the hotel everytime  I tried to use them. 
Some boutique hotels try to give tour information but not this hotel.

reviews.title: Lovely, but for away from the city.
reviews.text:
The hotel is placed behind an electronic store, which is so weird, compared to what you experience when you enter the actual hotel!
Very new, and very nice. 
You could get a nice view from your window since the hotel is placed "on a hill". 

Big bathroom, big bed - but NO AIRCONDITION! Please notice that. 

Breakfast is also fine, with a lot of Vietnamese / Asian options, which really fits there clientele I guess, since I only saw Asians besides us.

Not much else to say, than this is one of the "nicest" and "cleanest" hotels I stayed in in Vietnam, and I would stay there again, if I wasn't on a budget, and had the money to take a lot of caps to and from the city.

reviews.title: Lovely but far away from the city.
reviews.text: The hotel is placed behind an electronic store, which is so weird, compared to what you experience when you enter the actual hotel! Very new, and very nice. You could get a nice view from your window since the hotel is placed "on a hill". Big bathroom, big bed - but NO AIRCONDITION! Please notice that. Breakfast is also fine, with a lot of Vietnamese / Asian options, which really fits there clientele I guess, since I only saw Asians besides us. Not much else to say, than this is one of the "nicest" and "cleanest" hotels I stayed in in Vietnam, and I would stay there again, if I wasn't on a budget, and had the money to take a lot of caps to and from the city.

reviews.title: Excellent rooms, but space for improvement
reviews.text:
Family room with lots of space. 

But why have a minibar in each room, only with water?

Would be better - and cheaper for the hotel -  with a central fridge, where you could get cold water and ice cubes for drinks bought on your own. 
It is not possibly to get ice at the hotel at all...

Fine breakfast facilities, and good food.  
And okay service during our stay.

reviews.title: Great stay
reviews.text:
Value for money was good and breakfast included each morning.

Was very clean and house keeping were very attentive.

You really do need to hire a scooter if staying here and they make it very easy at the front desk.

The one biggest downside were the staff just didn't come across friendly.

Everywhere else staff have been super friendly and very accommodating. Here every time we asked for anything it seemed like a massive chore.

A minor thing but it's the small things that turn an "okay" stay to an amazing one.

reviews.title: Big, cozy & clean room
reviews.text: We feel comfortable staying in this family room.  Toilet also big & with separate WC & shower area as well as with 2 basins outside. 4 pax of us can use the toilets together at one time. Great & happy stay! Value for money in group or family travelling.

reviews.title: Clean, well-maintained, and spacious room
reviews.text:
Pros: Hotel was new, clean, and well-maintained. Room was clean and spacious, generally quite cooling even without A/C (open the windows!). Fan was important to keep the room ventilated. TV had good selection of non-Vietnamese channels. Breakfast was a good spread. 
Cons: Location is slightly farther from the city centre, and not at all easy to spot along the road for drivers. The basement floors seem claustrophobic though, with their very low ceilings; thankfully I was staying on the second level. No other facilities in the hotel.

reviews.title: Satisfactory, but could be improved to become excellent.
reviews.text:
KS has an easy-to-find address, right on main street 3/4, next to Điện máy Chợ Lớn. Both sides of the road have affordable dining and coffee options.

Initial impression: when I first arrived and saw the narrow facade, I felt a bit anxious, but I was surprised to find such a spacious and comfortable interior. My family of four stayed in a 100m2 suite with 3 bedrooms, 2 bathrooms, a living room, and a kitchen.

Pros: 1) Spacious area, feeling airy yet cozy; 2) A terrace and a hallway surrounding 3 sides, with a flower garden adding a friendly touch; 3) Very elegant color scheme, clean, pleasant to the eye, and simple yet stylish decor; 4) High-quality furnishings, well-maintained; 5) The view overlooking the valley behind the house is very open and beautiful while still maintaining privacy.

Cons include a few areas: 1) The lighting system design lacks professionalism; it's okay in terms of color temperature but does not consider visual tasks properly, with some areas improperly lit causing glare (like at the head of the bed), lacking focused light where needed (like at the sink), not accounting for shadow play (for the range hood above the stove), and inadequate pre-planning (the wardrobe door opens into the bedside lamp); 2) Allowing strangers and staff to walk around the hallway without warning creates a sense of insecurity and a lack of privacy for guests; 3) A couple of areas with cracked plaster on the walls; 4) No private parking, requiring us to rely on free parking at a nearby local government office 300m away.

Conclusion: The advantages clearly outweigh the disadvantages; I am ready to return here, as it is an ideal accommodation for a small family that values privacy, spaciousness, and is willing to cook simple meals.

reviews.title: Clean, Good service
reviews.text: Clean. Good sevicel

reviews.title: Really clean, comfy beds, very helpful staff enjoyed our stay
reviews.text: Great little find, room was a good size, nice bathroom with great shower. About a 15 min walk to town but easy to rent motorbikes from reception and easy to get around as not too busy on the roads. Datanla waterfalls was nice only 15 mins on bikes also don't miss the crazy house it's brilliant. Da Lat was definitely one of our favourite towns in Vietnam.

reviews.title: Great  place to stay in Đa Lat
reviews.text:
We spent 5 nites at the Luxe hotel. This brand new hotel,  there are so many Western people there. The room was big and clean. We have room near by the lift and staircase but it's really good due to soundproofing is perfect,  I slept very well. My room has valley & garden view. 
The bed was comfy, bath room was so big and pressure water was great. 
Breakfast is awesome! Buffet not too much choice but for me & my friend is enough, and you can order noodle which were changed everyday and other nice things. Designed of restaurant was very impressed - with big void at the middle :))
The only downside- internet speed and connection, unstable or even lost.
It take 10 minutes to go to the town but that's fine because i'm fan of walking. You can easyto get see off &  drop off front of the hotel from Airport shuttle bus. 
The reception & Bell need to improvement about service & smile. 
Will definitely return & highly recommend !!!!!

reviews.title: I really like this hotel. Everything is good! Only the location is not in center
reviews.text:
The excellent staff is very helpful. She help us to book luxury car for whole day trip with cheaper price. When we have miscommunication with driver, we call to hotel, she help us to translate. Really appreciate for that.

Newly hotel. Room is big and breakfast more choices. I choose this hotel because it included the breakfast so even thought far from center but we can having breakfast in hotel.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: I stayed on 1st floor so it's close to the main breakfast area so it's quite noisy. Main hallway needs to be carpeted to reduce noise or limit pass-through traffic. Other than that, everything is comparable to a 4* facility.

reviews.title: Perfect stay
reviews.text: We’ve had a wonderfull stay. The room was very clean, the bed was comfy and the breakfast was good. Especially the service of the team was perfect. Renting scooters was fixed in minutes, they arranged taxi’s for us and contacted our airline Vietjet directly when we couldn’t reach them. Perfect stay, thank you.

reviews.title: Great, spacious rooms and friendly staff
reviews.text: The hotel looks a bit shady from the outside because the front is very small and the decor from the outside is a bit questionable. It's also easy to miss if you are on a taxi because it is hidden by a huge electronics store right next to it. But once you step inside, it's completely different. Everything is sparkling clean and new. The staff is very friendly and helpful, giving directions and calling taxis for you. The room itself is chic and spacious beyond expectation, great value for money. The bathroom was very clean and the hot/cold water works perfectly. I would come here again!

reviews.title: A good hotel to stay which not far from city center
reviews.text: I love everything here. The staffs are very helpful and friendly. Furthermore, the breakfast included in our booking is a plus, even they don't have quite large room but the view is very nice. The hotel is new, fully equipped and clean. I would love to stay there again if I travel to Dalat

reviews.title: New Hotel and big room
reviews.text: We booked a family room which spacious with 2 king beds. Room is clean and new. Staffs are all friendly and kind, they let us checkin early at 1pm when room is ready. However, there was an extra charge VND80.000 for one of my children over 6years old but still ok with that. Recommend for friends.

reviews.text:

Our room was new, clean and comfortable and have a very good view. The receiptionist is also very helpful. 

The location is not very near the market however, if you like activities at Tuyen Lam lake, it is nearer. There are a chicken hotspot nearby which are famous and excellent as well.

reviews.title: a nice place to stay
reviews.text: I stayed here last vacation. The room was spacious, the floor and walls were neutral and luxurious. The staff were very nice, they brought my helmet in when it was raining. The view from the senior deluxe room is so chill. The only thing I don't like is that the mattress here is soft; lying down for a long time is quite painful for the back. Next time if I come back in the rainy season, I will stay here because the view is half forest, half houses, just chill enough without being too much.

reviews.title: Spacious beautiful room
reviews.text:
- The hotel is located on a main road but can be a bit hard to find because the entrance is somewhat hidden. When you are close to the location, you should call the hotel staff to make it easier to find the hotel and arrange parking.

- The entrance is small but the rooms are spacious, and the lobby is also large and beautiful. My family stayed in a room for 4 people. I was very surprised when we checked in because it was much bigger than I had imagined. The bathroom is also super spacious and clean. The decor is beautiful, modern, and very convenient.

- When I visited, the hotel did not serve meals. There is a cheap and delicious rice and noodle restaurant right next to the hotel, and my family had breakfast there throughout our trip.

- You can walk from the hotel to Tao Ngộ chicken hotpot and many other good restaurants.

reviews.title: New and contemporary hotel!
reviews.text: This hotel is like a hiden germ. It looked small at the entrace but it was  bigger and very beautiful once I stepped inside.  The frontdesk staffs were kind to give me a free upgrade to their Premier room.  The room looks romantic with warm lights, beautiful view, nice decorations. Their bed is so comfortable.  The room is spacious, and the bathroom is huge with clean white towels, a sepater shower and tub with big glass wall like a five star hotel. You can see the view from the bath tub. Oh, there is a flat screen smart TV too. Their free buffet breakfast was good. I love their Pho the most.  At night, it was nice taking a 5 minute taxi trip to Ho Xuan Huong Lake to stroll around the lake and try street food at Lam Vien square.  The hotel is on the main street and has 24hrs security so I feel safe.  I’ll definitely come back again. Strongly recommended.

reviews.title: Impressive Space with Exciting Potential!
reviews.text:
Stayed at The Luxe Hotel Da Lat and was blown away by the room size - absolutely massive! The space was incredible and gave us so much room to spread out and feel comfortable. It's rare to find such generously sized accommodations.

The hotel is currently undergoing renovations in certain areas, which shows they're committed to continuous improvement. While some parts are still being worked on, it's exciting to think about how amazing this place will be once everything is completed. You can already see the potential and quality they're aiming for.

Despite the ongoing renovations, our stay was comfortable and the existing facilities were well-maintained. The staff were accommodating and the overall experience was positive.

Looking forward to seeing the finished product - with rooms this spacious and clear investment in upgrades, The Luxe Hotel Da Lat is definitely one to watch. Would consider returning once the renovations are complete to experience the full vision!

Great value for the space you get, and even better things clearly on the horizon.

reviews.text: This is the first time I chose this hotel. Everything exceeded my expectations. The staff is friendly and professional. The rooms are clean, luxurious, modern, and spacious. The Luxe will always be my top choice when I visit Da Lat. Thank you, Luxe, for providing me and my family with a wonderful experience.

reviews.text: This is my favorite hotel in Da Lat. The location wasn't near the downtown but not far. It is next to famous chicken hot pot so it's convenience for a good lunch. The staffs are very helpful, we stayed here for the 3rd time or 4th times but always good. The room view is also good if you pick the Delux one, it look to the valley. Rooms are very clean also and it wasn't so expensive.

reviews.title: Better than expected.
reviews.text:
Great staff, cleanliness and the 3 bedroom apartment was huge! The view from the verandah in the evenings was beautiful. 

The only thing that would make even our stay even  better is if the apartments came with a washing machine.  Traveling with a kids it would more convenient to  be able wash your own  cloyhes at home:)

Thank you to all staff at The Deluxe Hotel, you guys are awesome.

reviews.title: Good accommodation

reviews.title: Really good value
reviews.text:
The hotel is very new. It is appartment style which I love. Breakfast included. I got it for 540k which is a discounted rate. Close to many good places for visiting and restaurant "lau ga le e" which is one of my highlights as well. 
Very clean.
The only thing is that it should have air condition.

reviews.title: Modern decoration, room is clean, good location and nice staff
reviews.text: i and my family stayed here 2 nights with deluxe room has nice view. Good location, you just take 4-5 mins to Central Market by motorbike, you can rent it at hotel. room is clean, staff are nice, and interior with modern design.

reviews.title: Feels good - clean and comfortable
reviews.text: Cable channel is a bonus.  Stayed on first floor. Spacious room with toiletries. Simple breakfast provided. Receptionist could converse in English with no difficulty.  New building and good maintenance with rooms. Love the cleanliness that made my stay so comfortable. Prefer disposable bedroom slippers though.

reviews.title: Best  find in Dalat
reviews.text:

The location is close to the lake , shopping, and restaurants!

reviews.title: Pleasant Stay

reviews.title: Well designed, clean, modern hotel
reviews.text:
Pro: perfect location, on main road, so the airport shuttle bus drop me off tight in front off hotel. New and well designed hotel. My room was valley view, happy with it, also impress with the squared glassed hallway,surround the breakfast place.  Breakfast was good too. When i check out but forgot something in my room,i dashed in and saw the hotel staff was removing all the bed sheet, so cleanliness is for sure.
The hotel also has bike for rent, gear is 120,000vnd, auto is 140,000vnd. Convenient. I arrived at hotel and rented the bike, start my venture, dont even need to wait till check in time. Have rest area  for guests waiting to check in/out.
Cons: although the bus drop me off right in front of hotel but i could not regconise it as it was next to a huge gadget store. Got distracted i think.
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Double Room with Valley View

reviews.title: Awesome service with awesome room
reviews.text: I arrived the hotel by 5am, and the hotel allow us to use their toilet to make a quick change. We place our luggage at reception counter, and they told us will give us a call when the room is ready. I expecting to check in by 3pm as what we have booked, but they call us in few hours later! Which they allow us to have super early check in without charging any extra fee! I got my premier room which looks exactly like in the photo! At first when I was inform that my room is in Basement 2, and the at the right end corner. I was so worried. But once I opened the door, the view is stunning! I got a super nice hill view from the room. Have a very great time throughout my stay!
reviews.room_type: Premier Double Room with View Bath

reviews.title: Best Hotel
reviews.text: Never had a better experience at a hotel then this one.  We travel 7 times a year plus one long one a year.  We average about 3 to 4 hotel on the long travel.  Room was super clean.  Place was well thought out and the breakfast was amazing.  Never missed a breakfast no matter how tired we were.  They rented motorbikes too!!

reviews.title: Khách sạn 3 sao tiêu chuẩn 3 sao, nhưng ở thực tế phục vụ và phòng tương đương khách sạn 4sao
reviews.text:
Chúng tôi ở phòng view đồi cực đẹp và lãng mạn. Khách sạn mới xây dựng nên phòng rất sạch sẽ, toilet và phòng tắm riêng, tivi màn hình phẳng, wifi cực mạnh. Ăn sáng buffet ngon hợp khẩu vị nhà hàng đẹp.
Nhân viên lễ tân vui vẻ nhiệt tình, thân thiện, loppy sang.
Vị trí thuận lợi xung quanh có nhiều quán cafe, quán ăn.
Nói chung giá rẻ hơn so với những gì khách sạng mang lại cho tôi. Tôi sẽ quay trở lại trong kỳ nghỉ tới

reviews.title: Khách sạn đẹp - sang trọng - Giá cả lợp lý
reviews.text: Khách sạn mới xây, nội thất đẹp sang trọng, nhân viên lễ tân trẻ đẹp thân thiện. View đồi rất đẹp lãng mạn, nhà hàng ăn sáng sang trọng thức ăn ngon phù hợp với gia đình mình. Nội thất của khách sạn thiết kế rất sang, giường gối sạch sẽ, toilet rất sạch phòng tắm và tolet tách biệt với nhau. Đây là địa điểm tốt để tôi và gia đình quay lại trong lần du lịch tiếp theo.
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Double Room with Valley View

reviews.title: Déçu
reviews.text:
En positif :
- décoration et taille de la chambre G101 (2 lits king size)
- très bonne qualité de la literie

En négatif
- pas de clim ! Réponse de l'hôtel : aucun hôtel à Da Lat n'en est équipé, il suffit d'ouvrir les fenêtres. Oui sauf qu'on est réveillé par les klaxons ou le chant des coqs ! Environ 24° dans la chambre, trop pour un français !  Après avoir passé la 1ère nuit avec le ventilo (trop bruyant, chaud sous la couette et froid aux bras à l'extérieur) j'ai finalement opté pour ne garder que la housse de couette.
- Très mauvaise insonorisation : bruits du couloir, des chambres adjacentes et du mur droit de la chambre qui communique avec une réserve : il y a un espace de 5 cm le long de la baie vitrée (!!!) et à 6h du matin on a été réveillés par les femmes de ménage qui parlaient à l'intérieur comme si elles avaient été dans la chambre (!)
- pas d'eau froide dans la douche (!) et eau chaude bien trop chaude (!) et pas possible de régler la T° donc
- buffet déjeuner moyen

reviews.title: Excellent choix
reviews.text:
L'hôtel est situé à quelques km du centre ville, sur un axe de grande circulation, un peu en retrait au fond d'une allée,  ce qui permet d'être au calme.  Il est donc nécessaire d'avoir recours à un taxi .
L'établissement est très récent, propre, l'agencement très moderne manquant par certains côtés de chaleur. Le personnel à l'accueil est très sympathique et bienvaillant. 
J'ai passé un excellent séjour dans cet hôtel à Đà Lạt.
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Double Room with Valley View
